summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) People & Talent professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing programs grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact—always seeking ways to improve the talent experience.

bullets.text: Managed {rec|full-cycle recruiting}—drafting JDs, posting openings, and researching global compensation for a challenging international role
Engaged {rec|passive candidates} via personalized communication and candidate experience, lifting applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants
Developed proficiency across HR functions, from {rec|recruitment} and compensation to performance management
Manage {coord|multiple concurrent} programs end-to-end in partnership with {cross|Marketing, Tech, and Sales hiring managers}, owning timelines and alignment
Use {data|enrollment and feedback data} to monitor pipeline health, optimize strategies, and surface issues early
Use {ai|AI tools (ChatGPT, Gemini)} daily to streamline workflows, drafting, and research across 20+ programs
Establish {cross|cross-functional} processes and documentation for 70+ staff, reducing onboarding time by 75%
Analyzed 2,000+ employee experiences to amplify employee voice and guide C-suite decisions on satisfaction drivers
Led a manager effectiveness initiative, transforming {data|feedback data} into actionable reports that informed strategy
Provided consultations to improve strategic plans and internal training on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review
Improved employee experience via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects across survey development, rewards & recognition, and L&D
Delivered strategic HR solutions for business priorities across {rec|recruiting}, headcount, and succession planning
Supported the HRBP team by piloting an Inclusive Leadership workshop for senior leaders, later scaled to 23 global locations
Optimized onboarding processes for new hires across 3 global locations through process analysis
Strengthened {cross|engagement} via an HR newsletter and award-winning well-being initiatives, recognized among 1,000+ competitors
As a team of consultants, partnered with an HR client to audit 300+ leave cases, quantifying $362K to refute cost assumptions
Empowered the HR team to present executive-ready {data|data} insights, leading to policy redesigns and first aid training

changeLog: 2026-05-31: Tailored for Duolingo — Recruiter II (Pittsburgh). Broad umbrella 'People & Talent.' Location → Pittsburgh, PA (role's office). Led with Kronos (full-cycle recruiting / passive candidates / events) since role is full-cycle non-technical recruiting. InGenius reframed for multiple concurrent searches, pipeline-health data, and an AI-tools bullet (JD explicitly names ChatGPT). Skills → Gem (JD-named) + LinkedIn Recruiter. Vestas bullet 1 surfaces recruiting. ODN collective. Counts fixed (Kronos/InGenius/NextGen/Vestas=4, ODN=2). NOTE: JD asks 3+ yrs full-cycle recruiting — Jamie's dedicated recruiting is Kronos internship + HRBP recruiting work; this is a STRETCH on years, strong on substance.
